title: Coalesce recomputes to prevent stampede
description: Serialize the refill of a hot key so one worker recomputes while others wait or serve stale.
body: Use when a hot key expires and many concurrent requests would recompute it at once. Do not let every concurrent miss reach the origin — that turns a single expiry into a load spike that can topple the backend. Actions: add a per-key recompute lock (single-flight / request coalescing) so one worker refills while the rest wait or serve the prior value, and pair it with stale-while-revalidate. Validation signals include origin calls staying near one per expiry and bounded refill latency. Risk boundary: a recompute lock with no timeout can deadlock all readers behind a slow origin — set a fallback to serve stale or fail open.
